blogs.title: WebSockets & Real-Time Communication
blogs.description: A comprehensive guide to WebSockets for real-time communication covering handshake, frames, Spring WebSocket, STOMP protocol, and scaling with Redis pub/sub
blogs.author: Abhishek Tiwari

blogs.title: Apache Kafka Deep Dive
blogs.description: A comprehensive deep dive into Apache Kafka covering topics, partitions, consumer groups, offset management, exactly-once semantics, Kafka Connect, and Kafka Streams
blogs.author: Abhishek Tiwari

blogs.title: Message Queues
blogs.description: A deep dive into message queues covering RabbitMQ vs SQS, exchanges, bindings, consumer patterns, and delivery semantics for reliable asynchronous communication
blogs.author: Abhishek Tiwari

blogs.title: Pub-Sub Model
blogs.description: A comprehensive guide to the publish-subscribe pattern in system design, covering message brokers, event-driven architecture, and implementation strategies for decoupled systems
blogs.author: Abhishek Tiwari

blogs.title: RESTful API Design
blogs.description: A comprehensive guide to RESTful API design covering resource modeling, HTTP methods, status codes, pagination, HATEOAS, versioning, and OpenAPI specification
blogs.author: Abhishek Tiwari
